ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, TIFF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., medical, surveillance, social media) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scans" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being scanned */,
  "scan_type" TEXT /* Type of scan performed (e.g., L192) */,
  "scan_date" TEXT /* Date the scan was performed */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Specific image processing algorithm used */,
  "scan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the scan in seconds */,
  "scan_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the scan */,
  "scan_result" TEXT /* Overall result or status of the scan (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scans_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scan the metrics belong to */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) value */,
  "ssim" REAL /* Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) value */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error (MSE) value */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Composite score combining PSNR, SSIM, and MSE */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the quality metrics */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source or tool used to compute the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES scans ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the image */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the image */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
